name: Thesis Tracker
description_en: Post-purchase discipline system: track buy thesis, milestones, warning signals, and exit criteria for each holding.
description_zh: 买入后的纪律系统：跟踪买入论文、里程碑、预警信号与退出标准。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It maintains a living investment thesis document for each position, records milestones and red flags, and forces a decision when the thesis breaks.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。为每个持仓维护一份动态投资论文文档，记录里程碑与危险信号，并在论文破裂时强制做出决策。
sec_note_en: Reads and writes local thesis files. No network access required for core tracking.
sec_note_zh: 读取并写入本地论文文件。核心跟踪无需联网。
